name: recoup-releases
description: The Recoup release workflow — one command takes an artist + release from creative brief through dated campaign, master doc, playlist targeting, and post-release monitoring, building a single release workspace.

interface.shortDescription: One command takes a release from brief to post-release monitoring.
interface.longDescription: The Recoup release workflow — one command takes an artist + release from creative brief through dated campaign, master doc, playlist targeting, and post-release monitoring, building a single release workspace. Requires the Recoup REST API.
